infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travel Diary uses your camera to capture photos for your travel entries.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Diary uses your location to automatically tag where each photo was taken.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Travel Diary may save photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Travel Diary uses your camera to capture photos for your travel entries.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Travel Diary uses your location to tag where each photo was taken.
